sentiment_score_definition: x <= -0.35: Bearish; -0.35 < x <= -0.15: Somewhat-Bearish; -0.15 < x < 0.15: Neutral; 0.15 <= x < 0.35: Somewhat_Bullish; x >= 0.35: Bullish
relevance_score_definition: 0 < x <= 1, with a higher score indicating higher relevance.

feed.title: Celsius (CELH) CFO has shares withheld to cover RSU tax obligation
feed.summary: Celsius Holdings, Inc. CFO Jarrod Langhans reported a routine tax-related share disposition where 4,391 shares of common stock were withheld to cover tax obligations upon the vesting of restricted stock units. This non-market transaction was priced at $35.25 per share, and after the disposition, Langhans directly holds 107,008 shares. This event is a standard process for covering RSU tax liabilities and is not considered an open-market sale.

feed.title: Cango bets on infrastructure to close power gap as EcoHash launches commercial AI inference platform
feed.summary: Cango Inc.'s subsidiary, EcoHash Technology LLC, has launched its commercial AI inference platform to address the significant "Power Gap" between rising AI compute demand and limited grid capacity, forecast to reach 400 TWh by 2030. EcoHash aims to convert Cango’s global energy infrastructure into a distributed AI compute network, starting with a 50-megawatt Georgia facility as a proof-of-concept. The strategy is supported by recent financing rounds totaling $75 million and utilizes the proprietary EcoLink Orchestration Platform to manage geographically dispersed compute capacity.

feed.title: BWET ETF Surges 664 Percent Following Strait of Hormuz Closure
feed.summary: The Breakwave Tanker Shipping ETF (BWET) has seen a massive 664% surge year-to-date and 1,276% over the last twelve months, due to the closure of the Strait of Hormuz in February 2026. This geopolitical event significantly increased crude oil tanker shipping rates by forcing longer routes and tightening Very Large Crude Carrier (VLCC) capacity. Despite its record performance, the ETF carries a high expense ratio and is subject to market risks, with short interest significantly increasing as traders anticipate a reversal in shipping costs once the geopolitical situation stabilizes.

feed.title: What triggered Bit Digital shares' latest price surge
feed.summary: Bit Digital Inc (BTBT) experienced a 2.53% price surge, trading at $1.62, showcasing strong short-term momentum despite a longer-term bearish trend. Technical indicators are mixed, with buying dominance intraday contrasted by overbought signals from several oscillators. Experts note the absence of fundamental catalysts and highlight resistance at $1.70, suggesting potential for consolidation or reversal.

feed.title: Form 424B3 GOLDMAN SACHS GROUP INC
feed.summary: This Form 424B3 filing by Goldman Sachs Group Inc. details a supplement for Medium-Term Notes, Series F, guaranteed by Goldman Sachs, relating to the S&P 500 Futures Excess Return Index. The document provides an overview of the index, its historical performance data, and lists various risk factors associated with investing in securities linked to it. It also compares the performance of the S&P 500 Futures Excess Return Index with the S&P 500 Index.

This development is expected to shift the first-line non-small cell lung cancer (NSCLC) standard of care. The competition highlights a growing trend in the biopharmaceutical landscape in China.
